name: @forwardimpact/libtype
description: Generated protobuf types and namespaces — one source of truth for service contracts.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Importing service types in a product and finding three different hand-maintained copies of the same definition.
jobs.bigHire: import service types from one generated source instead of maintaining copies.
jobs.littleHire: reference a service type and trust it matches the proto definition.
jobs.competesWith: hand-maintained type copies; inferring types from runtime responses; skipping types entirely
